title: Filipin Staining for Cholesterol Visualization in Adherent Cells
author: Himanshi Yaduvanshi
materials: Treat the cells for 04:00:00 with varying concentrations of the desired drug. Such as 2.5 millimolar (mM) Methyl-β-cyclodextrin Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #C4555 to deplete the cholesterol.
Fix the cells with 2 % (v/v) Paraformaldehyde Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #158127 (PFA) for 00:30:00 .

steps.title: Seed 5 × 10⁴ cells (For...
steps.instruction: Seed 5 × 10⁴ cells (For example 4T1) per well on a coverslip in a 24-well plate and allow them to adhere.

steps.title: Wash them with 1
steps.instruction: Wash them with 1.5 mg/mL Glycine Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #G8898 in PBS (1X) Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) for 00:10:00 at 37 °C to quench the PFA.

steps.title: Stain the cells with Filipin III...
steps.instruction: Stain the cells with Filipin III Santa Cruz Biotechnology Catalog #sc-205323 50 mg/mL in PBS for 04:00:00 at 37 °C .

steps.title: Mount the slides with mounting media...
steps.instruction: Mount the slides with mounting media containing nuclei stain Propidium Iodide (PI) Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #P4170 2 mg/mL .

steps.title: Obtain the images using a confocal microscope (for example
steps.instruction: Obtain the images using a confocal microscope (for example: Zeiss LSM 880 with a 63× oil immersion objective, 768 × 768 pixels, 20 µm scale bar, and process them using Zeiss ZEN 3.7). Zeiss LSM 700 (Confocal microscope, Zeiss) Zeiss ZEN 3.7 3.7

steps.title: Perform densitometric analysis using the ImageJ 1
steps.instruction: Perform densitometric analysis using the ImageJ 1.53c Software (National Institute of Health (NIH), USA) and blot the graph showing MFI of Filipin lll against drug concentration. FIJI (Image J) NIH

steps.title: Remove the media and add the...
steps.instruction: Remove the media and add the fresh media such as Dulbeccos modified eagle medium (DMEM), high glucose Gibco - Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #41965062
